title: Muskets and Sabres
description: Custom swords and musket textures. Pack doesn't replace any current texture, instead it add new one using CustomModelData.
body:
Muskets and Sabres!


Muskets and Sabres adds new textures for crossbow and swords (currently only netherite, diamond, golden and iron).

It only adds new textures, not replacing any existing ones, so use of commands is necessary to get access to them.


Commands to get specific items

Musket

  • Musket has a custom reloading animation.
  • It also has a different look, when you put it in your offhand (has to be unloaded) .
  • Currently there's not special version if you have a firework as amunition.
 /give @s crossbow{CustomModelData:1}

Rapier

  • Avaliable for iron, golden, diamond and netherite sword.
  • Instead of type in the command type a material (for example diamond_sword)
/give @s type_sword{CustomModelData:2}

Sabre

  • Avaliable for iron, golden, diamond and netherite sword.
  • Instead of type in the command type a material (for example diamond_sword)
/give @s type_sword{CustomModelData:1}
